title: MT Educare is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: MT Educare is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MT Educare. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About MT Educare:
MT Educare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare!
